test.name: Informant primary/secondary question should route to record-extraction
test.description: The user asks whether a death-certificate informant is primary or secondary for a fact. That is GPS Step 3 evidence classification — owned by record-extraction since the assertion-classification merge (2026-07-11) — not writing a proof conclusion.

input.user_message: Is the death-certificate informant primary or secondary for the father's name?

negative.explanation: Judging whether an informant provides primary or secondary information is three-layer evidence classification — record-extraction's job (it writes classifications at extraction and refines them on request; the former assertion-classification skill was merged into it). proof-conclusion uses classifications that already exist on assertions; it does not assign them.

judge_context: Should route to record-extraction (the classification owner since the assertion-classification merge) rather than producing a GPS proof narrative
